title: WITHDRAWN: Evidence Suggesting Prolonged Neuroinflammation in a Subset of Children after Moderate/Severe TBI: A UCLA RAPBI Study
author_string: McCabe, C., Dennis, E. L., Lindsey, H. M., Babikian, T., Bickart, K. L. et al.
abstract: Withdrawal StatementThe authors have withdrawn this manuscript because new data became available and reanalysis was inconsistent. A fresh preprint will be posted with the reanalysis. Therefore, the authors do not wish this work to be cited as a reference for the project. If you have any questions, please contact the corresponding author.
